why am i facing 1.3k
Ghelot frontline, change leah to doll or celeste, change aigis with ogrier, change the 4 cost wheel to something else

Possible synergies:
Ogrier gives the team sniping capabilities with his skill that gives taunt to an enemy character, ghelot has a skill that deals double damage to the enemy character with taunt.
Nautilus can give a strike card to someone who doesn't have a strike available after ogrier using charge skill, it can also be used to give someone 20 alimus to exhalt.
Doll/celeste can revive ghelot if she dies before managing to exhalt
I'll suggest for you to use a dispel wheel if you aren't using doll
